name: Frisco Outdoor Waterproof Stinkproof PVC Rope Leash
description: Looking for the right leash for your water-loving dog? The Frisco Outdoor Waterproof Stink-Proof PVC Rope Leash is perfect for dogs who enjoy a swim and pet parents who want to leave that tell-tale funk behind on the trail! This classic leash is made with polyester rope and coated in matte PVC that resists water and odor-causing bacteria. It features a lobster clasp that helps keep your pup securely leashed, and at the other end there’s a convenient D-ring where you can attach a waste bag dispenser. When you hit the road together, just grab this leash and you’re ready to go. Plus, it's available in three colors so you can perfectly match it to your pup’s style and personality.
